home_badge: A modern health record system for migrant workers
home_title: One secure health record that moves with every worker.
home_subtitle: Track health history, prescriptions, scans, and risk insights in a system designed for clinics, field teams, and administrators who need fast decisions without losing continuity of care.
home_secure_access_desc: Role-aware navigation for each user type
home_mobile_workflow_desc: Designed for clinics, camps, and outreach visits
home_controlled_visibility_desc: Sensitive data remains organized and protected
home_feature_nfc_desc: Fast patient access through NFC tags with minimal typing and fewer handoff errors.
home_feature_access_desc: Workers, doctors, and admins see only the tools and records relevant to their role.
home_feature_workflow_desc: Structured records, prescriptions, and analytics keep care movement simple across teams.
home_feature_lang_desc: Multilingual support helps the interface stay usable across diverse field conditions.
home_role_worker_desc: Access records, prescriptions, and updates from any device with a single secure identity.
home_role_doctor_desc: Scan NFC, add records quickly, and keep patient history organized in one place.
home_role_admin_desc: Monitor risk, adoption, and system health across regions with analytics that stay actionable.
